kept.text:
$CLBT: HUGE - Cellebrite finally gets the vaunted Fedramp authorization. Let's go! 🚀

For context: $CLBT is now authorized to access sensitive US government data, which opens up the possibility of new contracts from a host of US agencies (h/t @roncohen0547) https://t.co/BfQNjNIvvp

author.name: Kairos
author.location: Another brick in the wall st.

kept.text: $CLBT - Secures FedRamp High Authorization, opening the door to federal agencies and highly regulated enterprises to accelerate new cloud customer wins and expand deal sizes over time. https://t.co/vdkn4VVYf1

profile_bio.description:
Quality, Growth, and Microcap Investor. Long/Short GARP Investment Fund, email: sean@deepsailcapital.com
Shorts & Squeeze Corner: https://shortscorner.substack

kept.text:
Cellebrite just achieved FedRAMP High Authorization, the U.S. government's strictest security standard for cloud computing, with the DOJ acting as its official sponsor.

This is a big deal for $CLBT! It allows any federal agency to reuse the DOJ's security clearance to rapidly adopt Cellebrite's cloud solutions like Inseyets and Guardian.

Ultimately, this authorization eliminates the largest structural barrier to cloud adoption within federal agencies.

Source: Cellebrite IR
